AUTHOR: zensyra
COMMENTS: DB-01: composite index for findStravaIdsWithoutCaloriesByAthleteId() — used by SyncActivityDetailJob every hour. Without it PostgreSQL performs an in-memory sort over all activities without calories. DB-02: composite index for findPendingStreamActivitiesByAthleteId() — used by SyncActivityStreamsJob every hour. The OR condition on streams_sync_status prevents single-column index use.

AUTHOR: zensyra

AUTHOR: zensyra
COMMENTS: Phase 15 Wave 3 — multi-athlete index readiness. Adds a composite index on activities(athlete_id, start_date DESC) to eliminate the implicit sort step on findMaxStartDateByAthleteId and any future sorted per-athlete activity queries. All other per-athlete indexes (athlete_id on activities, gears, athlete_zones; stream sync composite; calories composite) are already present in changesets 007 and 016-019.
